exclusions.reason: **New feature.** State machine types (`kind = "state_machine"`) with states, transitions, initial state, and enforcement trigger generation. Includes PG enum creation, validation checks (W027/W028/E223/E224/E226), D2 state diagrams, and PL/pgSQL trigger enforcement.

**New feature.** Python query-layer codegen mode (`--mode query-layer`) with protocol-based backends (PgBackend, InMemoryBackend), per-table delegates, declarative constraint registry, and composite file organization.
